issue_summary: Improve BeanProperty to include 'isRequired()', as well as a method to traverse type/property hierarcy (JsonFormatVisitor)
javadoc_before:
/** *

* NOTE: due to introspection, this is a slow method to call * and should never be called during actual serialization or filtering * of the property. Rather it is needed for traversal needed for things * like constructing JSON Schema instances. * * @since 2.1 */
javadoc_after:
/** *

* NOTE: due to introspection, this is a slow method to call * and should never be called during actual serialization or filtering * of the property. Rather it is needed for traversal needed for things * like constructing JSON Schema instances. * * @since 2.1 * * @deprecated since 2.2, use {@link #isRequired()} instead. */
